overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through Night City. The player moves from a narrow graffiti-covered alley into a bustling commercial plaza filled with neon signs, market stalls, and pedestrians, eventually approaching a large building with prominent digital billboards. The scene features a distinctive cyberpunk aesthetic with dense urban architecture and vibrant neon lighting mixed with natural daylight.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow service alley with graffiti and debris

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through narrow alleyway with graffiti-covered walls

entered.detail: concrete wall covered in teal and white graffiti tags
industrial heater emitting bright purple light
scattered cardboard boxes and garbage on ground
large concrete elevated highway structure overhead

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a narrow alleyway with graffiti-covered walls and scattered debris. A bright purple neon heater sits near trash bins as the camera walks forward under a massive concrete overpass structure, transitioning from shadow toward a more open covered walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with seating and planters

events.description: emerging from dark alley into sunlit area under the overpass
pedestrians sitting on benches become visible in the plaza area

agents.ego_description: walking through covered plaza passing yellow hexagonal planters and seated pedestrians

notable_agents.action: person in yellow shirt sitting on wooden bench
person in green cap sitting on bench looking at device

entered.detail: hexagonal yellow concrete seating structures with plants
wooden and metal seating along walkway walls
tropical plants in large containers flanking walkway
large digital screens and neon signs on distant buildings

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a covered pedestrian walkway beneath the overpass, featuring hexagonal yellow planters and benches where pedestrians sit. Palm plants line the path as vibrant neon billboards become visible in the distance, marking the entrance to the commercial district.

scene_state.functional_zone: open commercial plaza with market stalls and dense signage

events.description: entering open plaza area filled with market stalls and vendor carts
slight navigation around pedestrians and stall obstacles

agents.ego_description: walking through busy plaza navigating between market stalls and browsing pedestrians

notable_agents.action: vendor standing behind food stall counter
pedestrian in blue jacket walking through plaza

entered.detail: wooden vendor stalls with awnings selling various goods
large pink digital billboard displaying WIDE OPEN text
mobile food vending carts with illuminated displays

segments.scene_description: The plaza opens up into a bustling commercial area with numerous market stalls and food carts lining the walkway. The famous WIDE OPEN billboard dominates the right side while pedestrians browse vendor goods. The camera navigates through moderate crowds as the density of neon signage increases.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial building entrance with large digital advertisements

events.description: approaching building facade with prominent coffee advertisement
descending stairs toward lower level entrance

agents.ego_description: walking toward building entrance and descending stairs while passing pedestrians

notable_agents.action: child walking ahead toward the stairs
pedestrian in brown coat walking up the stairs

entered.detail: massive vertical billboard advertising Matapang Coffee with group image
red rectangular sign with CHROMS text and star logo
illuminated sign for Nicola beverage with cup graphic
industrial HVAC equipment on building exterior

segments.scene_description: The final segment approaches a large commercial building dominated by the Matapang Coffee billboard and Chromatic signage. The camera descends stairs toward a lower entrance, passing air conditioning units and a Nicola beverage sign. The environment becomes more enclosed with artificial lighting dominating as the natural light fades.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a gritty, shadowed alleyway into a vibrant, neon-drenched commercial plaza. It begins amidst graffiti-covered walls and scattered debris, passing a purple neon heater as the camera moves under a massive concrete overpass. As the path opens into a covered pedestrian walkway, the environment shifts toward a more curated urban space featuring hexagonal yellow planters and palm plants that lead toward the distant glow of the commercial district. The scene then expands into a bustling plaza filled with market stalls and food carts, where the camera navigates through crowds beneath the dominating presence of a wide open billboard. Finally, the movement leads toward a large commercial building, descending stairs past air conditioning units and beverage signs as natural light fades and artificial neon lighting becomes the primary source of illumination.
